text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no wonder you've been so happy today! You
got a fan letter, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Y-you don't have to announce it to the world!
Urgh... Was I being that obvious about it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Probably more than you think. So what's it
say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um... They said they've been watching me in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And... that I looked cool.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you laughing about?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nothing. Just thinking back on an old memory.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That's amazing! They run in races and perform in concerts!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! They're so cool! So this is what the Twinkle
Series is about!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do that too! I wanna run in incredible
races and perform awesome dances!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know you can do it, Dober. I can't wait to see
you on stage!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You have to dance with me too, Ryan! We
can both wear sparkly clothes and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Stop, stop, stop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to bring that up! That was so long
ago!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. You were so cute then, I couldn't help
myself. Anyway, what I wanna say is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've come so far. You've gone from being an
admirer to someone who has admirers of her own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Admirers of my own, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There are so many things I still can't do, but... I
guess I've also come a long way since then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If you ask me, you've already made your
wish from back then come true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta do my best too! It's my job to dance
next to you in a sparkly outfit, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
C-cut it out already! That's practically ancient
history!
